languages.title: Gbegbɔgblɔ
languages.subtitle: Tia gbe si nèzã le dɔwɔnua katã me.
languages.noResults: Gbe aɖeke mesɔ kple wò didi o.

phone.label: Telefon xexlẽdzesi
phone.searchCountry: Di dukɔ, kɔda, alo kaƒoƒo ƒe ŋgɔdonya
phone.noCountries: Dukɔ aɖeke mesɔ kple wò didi o.
phone.countryButton: Trɔ dukɔ, fifia %{country} kpe ɖe %{callingCode} ŋu
phone.tooShort: Telefon xexlẽdzesi sia le kpuie akpa.
phone.invalid: Ŋlɔ telefon xexlẽdzesi si sɔ na dukɔ si nètia.
phone.valid: Dukɔwo dome telefon xexlẽdzesi si sɔ

auth.onboardingTagline: Ame ŋutɔ ƒe dedienɔnɔ zɔhɛ na ɣeyiɣi siwo le “I’m fine” kple “I need help” dome.
auth.createSubtitle: Tia mɔnu si dzi nàto age ɖe eme atsɔ akpɔ wò dedienɔnɔ ƒe nɔnɔmetata ta.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Míete ŋu wu asidede agbalẽ me nu o. Kpɔ wò kadodoa ɖa eye nàgadze agbagba ake.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Nutoa me ŋgɔyiyi ƒe ɣeyiɣi aɖe zazã. Native Google Sign-In wɔa dɔ le ŋgɔyiyi xɔtuƒe aɖe me.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Tsɔ eve fifia alo yi edzi eye nàtsɔe akpe ɖe eŋu emegbe.
auth.northStarBody: Nusi VL01 si wodona ate ŋu aʋã dedienɔnɔ ƒe sisiwo kple pɔmpiwo kple nyaƒoɖeamenu didiwo.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Wò dedienɔnɔ zɔhɛ fatu le anyigbatata dzi kple le kaƒoƒo me.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ateŋu akpeɖe ŋu le aƒeme nɔnɔme, dzɔla ƒe nɔnɔme, nɔnɔme kpata, taflatsedodo ƒe kaƒoƒo, kple gbe ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu me.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Wozãnɛ na anyigbatata, afɔku ƒe teƒewo, vava dedie, kple SOS nya siwo ƒo xlãe.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving biaa teƒe si wòle ale be dzɔlawo nate ŋu ase afisiwo kpekpeɖeŋu ate ŋu ahiã le gɔme. Àte ŋu atrɔ esia emegbe le Ðoɖowo me.
permissions.allowLocation: Ðe mɔ na teƒe si nèle
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Nyatakakawo doa alɔ amewo ƒe xɔxlɔ̃ kple nudzɔdzɔ kpatawo.
permissions.notificationsBody: Nyatakakawo koe míezãna hena dedienɔnɔ ŋuti nyatakakawo, nyatakaka yeyewo, kple ŋkuɖodzinya siwo nèwɔ dɔ.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Teƒe si wole na dedienɔnɔ ƒe nya siwo ƒo xlãe la sɔ pɛpɛpɛ
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving zãa afi si nèle hena dedienɔnɔ ƒe anyigbatata, afɔku ƒe teƒewo, mama kabakaba, kple SOS nya siwo ƒo xlãe. Àte ŋu atrɔ esia emegbe le Ðoɖowo me.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Dedienɔnɔ ŋuti nuxlɔ̃amewo hiã na nyatakakawo
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ɖoa ŋkuɖodzinya siwo ku ɖe xɔme yiyi ŋu, nyatakaka yeye siwo ku ɖe nudzɔdzɔ kpatawo ŋu, kple dedienɔnɔ ŋuti nyatakaka siwo nèwɔ dɔ la ɖa. Míezãa nyatakakawo hena boblododowo o.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Nuƒomɔ̃ naa ŋusẽ dedienɔnɔ ƒe kaƒoƒo
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving zãa wò nuƒomɔ̃ ne èdze AI zɔhɛ alo dedienɔnɔ ƒe kaƒoƒo gɔme ko.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth doa ka kple wò wearable
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving zãa Bluetooth tsɔ ƒoa ƒu kple NorthStar atsyɔ̃ɖonuwo, xlẽa kadodo ƒe nɔnɔme, eye wòʋãa dedienɔnɔ ƒe sisi tso nusi wodona me.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving zãa fotoɖemɔ̃a ne ètiae be yeaɖe yeƒe nɔnɔmetata alo yeama dedienɔnɔ ƒe nɔnɔmetata ko.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving nana be sisi sia nɔa anyi tso Settings kple dashboard la gbɔ.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Tia zɔhɛ ƒe gbe si se le eɖokui me be yease dedie wu.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Ŋkuléle ɖe nu ŋu le ɖoɖoezizi me hena gbesiagbe dedienɔnɔ.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Gblɔ nya siwo ƒo xlãe na ame siwo dzi nèka ɖo.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Tap atɔ̃ ate ŋu adzi ɖe edzi va ɖo SOS kple dzɔla ƒe nuxlɔ̃amewo.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Wɔ susu nyui aɖe si ta nàdzo le nɔnɔme si me dzidzeme mele o me.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Dze zɔhɛ kaƒoƒo gɔme le ɣeyiɣi ŋutɔŋutɔ me ne èhiã kpekpeɖeŋu.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Te dedienɔnɔ ƒe sisiwo kpɔ le nyaƒoɖeamenu sue ƒe wɔwɔfia me.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Na atsyɔ̃ɖonuwo nanɔ teƒe si te ɖe ŋuwò ne èle scan wɔm.
jewelry.scanning: Scanning si te ɖe afima ŋu...
jewelry.noDevices: Womekpɔ NorthStar mɔ̃ siwo te ɖe afima ŋu haɖe o.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning mete ŋu dze egɔme o. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.
jewelry.scanFailed: Míekpɔ atsyɔ̃ɖonu siwo te ɖe mía ŋu o. Kpɔ Bluetooth ɖa, na NorthStar te ɖe eŋu, eye nàgadze agbagba ake.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning mete ŋu dze egɔme o. Kpɔ Bluetooth access eye nàgadze agbagba ake.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Mɔ̃ si te ɖe ŋuwò ƒe mɔɖeɖe tsi. Ðe mɔ Bluetooth ge ɖe Settings me, emegbe nàgadze agbagba ake.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar xɔ ɣeyiɣi didi akpa hafi do ka. Tsɔe te ɖe eŋu eye nàgadze agbagba ake.
jewelry.connectFailed: Míete ŋu do ka kple NorthStar o. Kpɔe ɖa be wodo agba nɛ eye wòte ɖe eŋu hã, emegbe nàgadze agbagba ake.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Mɔ̃ aɖeke mele afima si te ɖe ŋuwò haɖe o
jewelry.emptyMessage: Na NorthStar nanɔ charge eye nàte ɖe telefon sia ŋu, emegbe nàgawɔ scan ake.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Mele NorthStar mɔ̃ siwo te ɖe ŋuwò dim...

home.subtitle: Dedienɔnɔ ƒe zɔhɛ ƒe dashboard
home.readyBody: Gbe, anyigbatata, atsyɔ̃ɖonuwo, kple dzɔlawo le pɔmpi ɖeka gbɔ.
home.noDevice: Mɔ̃ aɖeke mele kadodo me o

map.retry: Gbugbɔ te teƒe si nèle la kpɔ
map.title: Dedienɔnɔ ƒe nɔnɔmetata
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ŋgɔdonya; Mapbox ewɔa nu le ŋgɔyiyi ƒe xɔtutu me.
map.updateFailed: Míete ŋu trɔ asi le wò teƒea ŋu o. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.
map.notRequested: Womebia be woakpɔ teƒea o. Àte ŋu awɔe emegbe tso Ðoɖowo me.
map.permissionOff: Wotsi teƒea ƒe mɔɖeɖe. Na wòawɔ dɔ le Settings me be wòatsɔ dedienɔnɔ ƒe anyigbatata la aɖo titina na wò.
map.timeout: Wò teƒea le ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe xɔm wu alesi nèsusui. Ʋu yi teƒe aɖe si dzesi si me kɔ wu le eye nàgadze agbagba ake.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Teƒe aɖeke meli si wodzra ɖo haɖe o
map.savedEmptyMessage: Teƒe siwo dzi nèka ɖo siwo nèdzra ɖo la adze le afisia be nàte ŋu akpɔ wo kaba.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.offlineCompanion: Xɔlɔ̃ si mele Internet dzi o
safetyCall.ready: Dzra ɖo be yeatsɔ aƒo ka
safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Kadodo dedie kple wò gbe zɔhɛ...

messagesWaiting.one: %{count} gbedasi si le lalam be yeaɖo ɖa
messagesWaiting.other: %{count} gbedasi siwo le lalam be woaɖo ɖa

safetyCall.useOffline: Zã zɔhɛ si mele Internet dzi o
safetyCall.reconnect: Gbugbɔ do ka kple gbe AI
safetyCall.emptyTitle: Wò dzeɖoɖo dze egɔme tso afisia
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Dze kaƒoƒoa gɔme alo nàŋlɔ gbedasi ne èle klalo.

history.clearMessage: Esia ɖea AI zɔhɛ gbedasi siwo wodzra ɖo la ɖa le mɔ̃ sia dzi.
history.title: Dzeɖoɖo ŋutinya
history.subtitle: AI zɔhɛ gbedasi siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe mɔ̃ sia dzi.
history.empty: Womedzra dzeɖoɖo aɖeke ɖo haɖe o.
history.emptyMessage: Wò AI zɔhɛ dzeɖoɖowo adze le afisia le wò kaƒoƒo gbãtɔ megbe.
history.loadFailed: Míete ŋu tsɔ dzeɖoɖo ŋutinya de agba me o. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.
history.clearFailed: Míete ŋu kɔ dzeɖoɖo ŋutinya me o. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.
history.deleteFailed: Míete ŋu tutu dzeɖoɖo ma ɖa o. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.

voices.title: Nye dedienɔnɔ yɔyɔ ƒe gbewo
voices.subtitle: Tia zɔhɛ ƒe gbe si se le eɖokui me be esɔ be yease.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Taflatse gadze agbagba nàtia gbea ake.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Womete ŋu ƒo gbe ƒe kpɔɖeŋu sia o. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.

settings.offlineMode: Nɔnɔme si mele Internet dzi o
settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Zã zɔhɛ ƒe ŋuɖoɖo siwo woƒo ƒu ne network alo Hume ɖaseɖigbalẽwo meli o.
settings.privacyBody: Ðe teƒea ƒe nyatakaka siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe mɔ̃ sia dzi la ɖe duta alo tutu wo ɖa.
settings.preparingExport: Dzadzraɖo ɖe nusiwo woatsɔ ayi duta ŋu...
settings.deleteAll: Tutu nutoa me nyatakakawo katã ɖa
settings.exportFailedMessage: Màte ŋu aɖo wò nyatakakawo ɖe duta fifia o.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Tutu nutoa me nyatakakawo katã ɖaa?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Esia ɖea wò nɔnɔmetata, ɖoɖowo, kadodo kpatawo, dzeɖoɖo ŋutinya, mɔɖeɖe ƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo, kple teƒea ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi ƒe ɣeyiɣi ɖa le mɔ̃ sia dzi.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Mete ŋu tutu nutoa me nyatakakawo fifia o.

sections.languageSubtitle: Interface kple system ƒe mɔɖeɖe gbegbɔgblɔ
sections.companionSubtitle: Gbe kple esiwo mele Internet dzi o ƒe didiwo
sections.privacySubtitle: Ŋutinya, nusiwo wodɔna ɖa, wo ɖeɖeɖa, kple ɖoɖowo
sections.accountSubtitle: Wò VeryLoving ɣeyiɣi si nèwɔna fifia

settings.updateFailedMessage: Míete ŋu dzra didi ma ɖo o. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.
settings.signOutFailedTitle: Mete ŋu de asi agbalẽ te o
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Wò ɣeyiɣia gakpɔtɔ le dɔ wɔm. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.

contacts.title: Amesiwo woate ŋu aƒo ka na le nɔnɔme kpatawo me
contacts.subtitle: Ame siwo dzi woka ɖo la li le dedienɔnɔ ƒe sisiɣiwo.
contacts.name: Ŋkɔ
contacts.empty: Wometsɔ kadodo kpata aɖeke kpe ɖe eŋu haɖe o.
contacts.emptyTitle: Womekpɔ kadodo kpata aɖeke haɖe o
contacts.emptyMessage: Tsɔ ame aɖe si dzi nèka ɖo kpee ale be wòanɔ klalo ne dedienɔnɔ ƒe sisi aɖe hiã wo.
contacts.removeMessage: Ame sia magadze le wò sisi kpata me o.
contacts.nameRequired: Ŋlɔ ame si nèdi be yeaƒo ka na la ƒe ŋkɔ.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Míete ŋu dzra kadodo sia ɖo o. Kpɔ nyatakakaawo ɖa tsitotsito eye nàgadze agbagba ake.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Míete ŋu ɖe kadodo sia ɖa o. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.

device.title: Mɔ̃wo dzi kpɔkpɔ
device.subtitle: Dzra wò NorthStar mɔ̃a dzi.
device.none: Mɔ̃ aɖeke mele kadodo me o
device.disconnect: Tsɔ kadodoa ɖa le mɔ̃a ŋu

friends.title: Xɔlɔ̃wo
friends.subtitle: Dzɔlawo, biabia, kple nudzɔdzɔ kpata ƒe nɔnɔmetata.
friends.emptyTitle: Wò dedienɔnɔ ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa le ƒuƒlu
friends.emptyMessage: Xɔlɔ̃ kple dzikpɔla siwo dzi woka ɖo la adze le afisia ne wonya tsɔ wo kpee ko.

emergency.title: Nu kpata SOS
emergency.subtitle: Ne èhiã kpekpeɖeŋu enumake ko hafi nàdzi ɖe edzi.
emergency.body: Esia ana nànya wò dedienɔnɔ ƒe sisi eye wòadzra kadodowo ɖo le nɔnɔme kpatawo me.
emergency.notificationBody: Wò sisi kpata la sɔ gbe.
emergency.addContact: Tsɔ kadodo kpata aɖe kpe ɖe eŋu le Ðoɖowo me.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Teƒe mamã ƒe stub le klalo. Do ka kple backend share endpoint be nàɖo kadodo siwo le agbe.

quickShare.title: Mamã kabakaba
quickShare.subtitle: Teƒe ƒe mama ƒe sisi le klalo.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Tsi wò NorthStar dzi zi eve be nàtsɔ dedienɔnɔ ƒe akɔɖu aɖe aƒu gbe.
capybearTap.body: Asiwɔwɔ ƒe mɔnu le klalo na BLE nudzɔdzɔ kaƒoƒo.

debug.title: VeryLoving debug ƒe axa
debug.subtitle: Mɔ si dzi woato awɔ ŋgɔyiyi ɖeɖeko.

errors.voiceOffline: Edze abe mèle Internet dzi o ene. Woaɖo wò gbedasi ɖa ne ègaɖo kadodo me ake.
errors.voiceQueued: Wodzra gbedasi ɖo. Woaɖoe ɖa ne gbeɖiɖi ƒe zɔhɛa gaɖo kadodo me ake.
errors.voiceRetrying: Ele agbagba dzem be yeagaɖo wò gbedasi ɖa ake...
errors.voiceConnecting: Kadodo dedie kple wò gbe zɔhɛ...
errors.microphone: Microphone zazã hiã na gbeɖiɖi kaƒoƒo. Àte ŋu awɔe le Ðoɖowo me, alo aŋlɔ gbedasi ɖe eteƒe.
errors.billing: Gbe ƒe zɔhɛ si le Internet dzi la megali o hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe. Àte ŋu ayi edzi kple zɔhɛ si mele Internet dzi o.
errors.authentication: Gbe zɔhɛa mete ŋu ɖo kpe ɣeyiɣi sia dzi o. Gage ɖe eme ake alo zã zɔhɛ si mele Internet dzi o fifia.
errors.timeout: Gbe zɔhɛa xɔ ɣeyiɣi didi akpa hafi ɖo eŋu. Kpɔ wò kadodoa ɖa eye nàgadze agbagba ake.
errors.network: Míete ŋu ɖo gbe zɔhɛa gbɔ o. Kpɔ wò kadodoa ɖa, emegbe nàgadze agbagba ake alo nàyi edzi le Internet dzi.
errors.genericVoice: Nane do kplamatse gbeɖiɖi ƒe kaƒoƒoa. Gadze agbagba ake, alo yi edzi kple zɔhɛ si mele Internet dzi o.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving hiã nuƒomɔ̃ ƒe zazã hena dedienɔnɔ kple AI zɔhɛ kaƒoƒo.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving zãa afi si nèle hena dedienɔnɔ ƒe anyigbatata kple dedienɔnɔ ƒe nɔnɔme siwo te ɖe ŋuwò.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving zãa Bluetooth tsɔ doa ka kple wò NorthStar dedienɔnɔ ƒe atsyɔ̃ɖonuwo.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Mawɔɖeɖe ƒe mɔnu sia mele app ƒe tata sia me o.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Yi edzi abe demo ene (ŋgɔyiyi me dɔwɔwɔ ko)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo mode zãa aʋatsodzedze ƒe nyatakakawo siwo le mɔ̃a dzi ko. Womeɖo kpe ɖe dɔ siwo le kadodo me ŋu be woawo ŋutɔwoe o, eye session sia agbugbɔ dze egɔme ne woɖo app la yeye.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Kpeɖodzi ƒe code la mesɔ o alo eƒe ɣeyiɣi va yi. Bia code yeye eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Mawɔɖeɖe ƒe dodokpɔ geɖe akpa. Lala vie, eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Mawɔɖeɖe ƒe kpeɖodzi la xɔ ɣeyiɣi didi akpa. Kpɔ wò Internet kadodo dzi eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Míete ŋu te ɖe mawɔɖeɖe ƒe dɔ la ŋu o. Kpɔ wò Internet kadodo dzi eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Wò session ƒe ɣeyiɣi va yi. Wɔ ɖe eme ake.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Womete ŋu ɖo dedinɔnɔ ƒe map la o. Kpɔ wò Internet kadodo dzi eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Wò teƒe si nèle fifia mele eme o. Wò teƒe mamlɛtɔ si woɖo ɖi tso %{capturedAt} lae nye esi fia.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Míete ŋu ma wò teƒe o. Kpɔ teƒe ŋu mɔɖeɖe dzi eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Afimae mele esi woŋlɔ ɖi le %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Afimae nye nye teƒe mamlɛtɔ si woɖo ɖi eye woŋlɔ le %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Bluetooth ŋu mɔɖeɖe le tututu. Ɖe mɔ nɛ le Settings me, eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Wotso Bluetooth. Dae, eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bluetooth pairing mele mɔ̃ sia alo app ƒe tata sia dzi o.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Míete ŋu kpɔ NorthStar o. Kpɔ egbɔ, kpɔ Bluetooth dzi, eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Womekpɔ NorthStar mɔ̃ aɖeke le ŋgɔgbɔ o. Kpɔ egbɔ eye nàgbugbɔ di ake.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Míete ŋu bla ɖe NorthStar ŋu o. Na eƒe battery nayɔ eye wòakpɔ egbɔ, eye nàgbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Míete ŋu ɖo teƒe sia ɖi o. Gbugbɔ agbadze ake.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Telefon ƒe xexlẽƒe ʋu; womete ŋu de kpe ɖe yɔyɔ la dzi o.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Nuxaxa me kadodonyigba aɖeke meli o; womeyɔ telefon o.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Telefon ƒe xexlẽƒe mete ŋu ʋu o; womeyɔ telefon o.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Womete ŋu de kpe ɖe SOS dodokpɔ mamlɛtɔ la dzi o.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Gbegblɔla kpeɖeŋutɔ la mele eme fifia o. Gbugbɔ agbadze emegbe alo yi edzi kple kpeɖeŋutɔ si mezãa Internet o.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Trɔ asi le nuxaxa me kadodonyigba ŋu
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Wotrɔ asi le nuxaxa me kadodonyigba ŋu.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.
